title: v38 — QA-fix wave (login, HUD, combat, prayer, magic, dialogue, dev tools)

items.title: Login screen on load
items.how: On load a login/landing screen appears; type a name and Enter Eldermoor starts the game.

items.title: Logout returns to login
items.how: Open the Logout tab → Logout: it returns to the login screen, not a dead/blank screen.

items.title: XP counter no longer overlaps inventory
items.how: Gain XP with the inventory open — the XP-gained numbers don't sit on top of the inventory.

items.title: Chat box always visible
items.how: A chat box is visible at bottom-left and stays usable even with the inventory/tab panel open.

items.title: Stat orbs placed cleanly
items.how: HP/Prayer/Run/Spec orbs sit in a tidy cluster (under the minimap), not overlapping anything.

items.title: Proper tab dock
items.how: The tabs are a fixed docked strip (no random floating 'Tabs' button up top).

items.title: Warm brown-stone tone
items.how: The UI reads warm brown-stone (OSRS-like), not blue everywhere.

items.title: Minimap rebuilt
items.how: Minimap has a compass, click-to-walk, zoom (scroll/pinch), and coloured blips.

items.title: Combat styles explain + train
items.how: Combat tab lists styles with what each trains; XP goes to the matching skill; styles change when you equip a different weapon (bow vs sword).

items.title: Full prayer roster
items.how: Prayer tab shows a large roster (~28) with level requirements; locked ones greyed.

items.title: Spellbook tiers + runes
items.how: Magic tab shows strike/bolt/blast/wave tiers + teleports/alchemy, each with rune requirements; greyed when you lack runes/level.

items.title: Dialogue dismiss + new chat
items.how: Walking away from an NPC closes the dialogue; you can immediately talk to a different NPC; Esc/X also closes it.

items.title: Dev toolbox
items.how: Press backtick (`) or the 🛠 button: a dev panel opens to give items, set skills/HP/prayer, give runes, teleport, and spawn a mob.

items.title: Dev kit complete
items.how: The dev character has all runes + a spread of gear tiers + tools to test everything.

items.title: Gear tiers exist
items.how: Multiple gear tiers exist beyond bronze (Ferrite→Steel→Blacksteel→Duskstone→Verdigrant→Sunsteel) — give yourself some via the dev toolbox.

items.title: QA live sync
items.how: As you tap Pass/Fail/notes, results sync to the dev dashboard.
